mission.title: fluent-bit: Incorrect parsing of escaped characters from higher unicode planes in a JSON string
mission.description: Incorrect parsing of escaped characters from higher unicode planes in a JSON string. Requested by 16+ users.

steps.title: Check current fluent-bit deployment
steps.description:
Verify your fluent-bit version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit
helm list -n fluent-bit 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working fluent-bit installation.

steps.title: Review fluent-bit configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant fluent-bit configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit
kubectl get configmap -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=fluent-bit
```
## Bug Report

All characters in a JSON string are by [its specification](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc4627.html#section-2.5) Unicode and all can be escaped using the `\u####` notation.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Incorrect parsing of escaped characters from higher unicode…
steps.description:
Currently, we ignore surrogate pairs for \u escape on Unicode representation.
To handle this, we need to process with surrogate pairs manner.
Noe that this representation is also encoded `\uXXXX` representation on creating JSON.
On creating msgpack, this unescaping operation is effective.
```yaml
[{"date":1733946314.083699,"text":"������"}]
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit
kubectl get events -n fluent-bit --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Incorrect parsing of escaped characters from higher unicode…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Currently, we ignore surrogate pairs for \u escape on Unicode representation.
To handle this, we need to process with surrogate pairs manner.
Noe that this representation is also encoded `\uXXXX` representation on creating JSON.
On creating msgpack, this unescaping operation is effective. 

----
Enter `[N/A]` in the box, if an item is not applicable to your change.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with fluent-bit installed or the issue environment reproducible.
